title: New Note — orphan HEIC attachment (June 2024 Shanghai era)
html:
TL;DR

  • Orphan Apple Note from June 16, 2024 containing only a HEIC image attachment reference (B4F9D27F-A69A-4844-9F2A-0BC5FB9E7FFD) — no text body.
  • Falls inside Yahir's shanghai study abroad / china chapter window — likely a phone screenshot or photo captured while abroad and never annotated.
  • Classic artifact: the title literally is "New Note", the body is a binary blob reference, the file persists for 18+ months untouched.
  • Asset is not recoverable from the Apple Notes SQLite export — only the HEIC pointer survives. If Yahir wants the image, it lives on the source device.
  • One of three identically-shaped orphan attachment notes in 2024 (2024 07 31 new note, 2024 09 10 3 are the others) — together they trace a pattern of capture-and-forget during the China leg.

Why it gets a summary anyway

  • For graph completeness: an orphan node is still a node, and the timestamp anchors what Yahir was doing in mid-June 2024 (Shanghai-era, between the Sam rumination note and the wrld side quests).
  • Shows the failure mode of capture — mobile photo→note flow that loses the photo on export.

Connections

  • — canonical example of the lost-attachment pattern
  • shanghai study abroad — temporal context
  • china chapter — chapter window
  • 2024 07 31 new note · 2024 09 10 3 — sibling orphan-attachment notes
